mapper.select: SELECT A.team_user_ref_id AS teamUserRefId, B.mch_name AS mchName, A.attendance, B.account_type AS accountType, A.travel_date AS travelDate, A.user_id AS userId, C.team_person AS teamPerson, A.STATUS as teamStatus, A.type, A.mch_review_time as mchReviewTime, A.hotel_rooms AS hotelRooms, A.mch_review_reason AS mchReviewReason, C.official_review_reason AS officialReviewReason FROM team_user_ref A LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, account_type, mch_name FROM attract_user) B ON B.user_id = A.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT team_id,team_person ,official_review_reason FROM travel_team)C ON C.team_id = A.team_id WHERE A.team_id = #{teamId} AND A.delete_flag = '0' ORDER BY travel_date ASC
